_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_loki.loki_search_errors with namespace='agentic-dev', time_range='1h'. The oap-loki-mcp tool returns a FORMATTED MULTI-LINE TEXT STRING (server.py loki_search_errors). FastMCP wraps the string return as content[{type:'text', text: <string>}]. The mcp-proxy passes through 2 layers of result unwrap. The mcp_tool node's content-block joiner collapses content[].text into a single `content` string. Captured on 2026-05-13 from the live agentic-dev namespace — REAL error logs from the three down-target apps (minio, postgresql, redis-master) so the correlate transform's pod-name substring matcher associates each down target back to its log excerpt.
